creator: vmiller@hostileadmin.com
text: Applying the attached patch after cp'ing the GSSAPI patch in distfiles/ to the name expected by the Makefile resulted in the OpenSSH-portable package building. Resulting package was tested successfully. That being said, upstream still does not appear to have an official patch for this release yet. So the distinfo portion of the patch is superfluous since the patch cannot be retrieved from PATCHSITE.
